seoTitle: Cooranga vs Cooroo Lands — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cooranga and Cooroo Lands. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cooranga vs Cooroo Lands: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cooranga and Cooroo Lands.
heading: Cooranga vs Cooroo Lands — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cooranga, Queensland and Cooroo Lands, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cooroo Lands has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Cooranga (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cooranga or Cooroo Lands safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cooranga has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Cooroo Lands scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cooranga scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Cooroo Lands scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cooranga or Cooroo Lands?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cooroo Lands has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
